hypothesis_test.claim: SP-GQE(n=2,τ=0.5) improves mean token F1 vs V-RAG on bridge (multi-hop) questions; comparison subset is secondary.

literature.ref: Lewis et al., NeurIPS 2020; follow-up retrieval stacks
literature.notes: Depends on reader; HotpotQA distractor is harder than full-wiki.

literature.setting: Corpus-specific graph; not identical to HotpotQA distractor
literature.hotpot_f1: N/A (different task mix; strong on global queries)
literature.notes: Heavy offline indexing; not directly comparable sample-for-sample.

literature.hotpot_f1: Reports large gains on STaRK Hit@1; HotpotQA not primary table

literature.setting: KG subgraph retrieval with lightweight scorer
literature.hotpot_f1: Strong on KG-QA benchmarks in paper; architecture-specific
literature.notes: Trained scorer vs our training-free pruning.

literature.hotpot_f1: Neither RAG nor GraphRAG universally dominates
literature.notes: Motivates hybrid / query-aware graph use (aligned with SP-GQE).

literature.setting: HotpotQA distractor dev subset + co-occurrence KG + extractive answer
literature.hotpot_f1: See results/run_summary.json — relative trends > absolute SOTA
